package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerAsyncConcurrencyMutexHeldDuringSlowCall() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_mutex_held_during_slow_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag mutex-protected regions that include network, disk, or database calls."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
